payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM concert c JOIN stadium s ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN ('2014', '2015') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;"}

payload.result: content='{"ok": true, "row_count": 1, "columns": ["Name", "Location"], "preview_rows": [["Somerset Park", "Ayr United"]], "dtypes": {"Name": "str", "Location": "str"}, "executed_sql": "SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM concert c JOIN stadium s ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN (\'2014\', \'2015\') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;"}' name='execute_sql' id='bd0a54b7-dde6-4705-aa94-5dc3bbbb7fca' tool_call_id='H9f2pFtfS'

final.final_sql: SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM concert c JOIN stadium s ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN ('2014', '2015') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;
final.answer_text: The stadium that had concerts in both 2014 and 2015 is Somerset Park, located in Ayr United.
